hero.description: 45+ years equipping Egypt's workshops, dealerships, and fleet operators with the world's most trusted automotive equipment brands.

categories.heading: Equipment Categories
categories.subheading: Six specialized categories covering every corner of the professional automotive workshop.

why.heading: Why Choose Elbassiouni
why.subheading: Four decades of trust, built one workshop at a time.
why.r1Desc: Since 1980, Elbassiouni has been the trusted name in automotive equipment across Egypt. Our deep market knowledge means we recommend the right solution for your specific needs.
why.r2Desc: We represent only the most respected international manufacturers — Hunter Engineering, Rotary Lift, Maha Haldenwang, and 11 more — giving you access to the best equipment available.
why.r3Desc: From installation and training to maintenance contracts and spare parts, our support team ensures your equipment performs at its best throughout its lifetime.
why.r4Desc: All equipment we supply meets Egyptian regulatory requirements. Our inspection lane systems are fully compliant with traffic authority standards.

cta.heading: Ready to Equip Your Workshop?
cta.description: Contact our team today for product demonstrations, pricing, and expert advice tailored to your operation.

about.heading: The house of ELBASSIOUNI
about.subheading: Automotive workshop equipment, supplied, installed and supported by the same house — since 1978.
about.noteHeading: A workshop is not a showroom.
about.noteP1: It is a place where vehicles are measured, diagnosed, lifted, aligned, painted and returned to the road. Every piece of equipment in it is a decision the owner will live with for ten or fifteen years.
about.noteP2: For forty-eight of those years, we have been the people Egyptian workshop owners call when they need that decision to be right.
about.noteP3: The El Bassiouni name entered the industry in 1978 as Kärcher's first sole agent in Africa. In 1997, ELBASSIOUNI for Equipment was established to carry the work forward under a single roof. Three generations of customers have grown with us. What has not changed is the standard we hold.
about.y1978Chapter: Chapter I — The name enters the industry
about.y1978P: Mohamed El Bassiouni founds the family trading house and is appointed the first Kärcher sole agent in Africa. Over the years that follow, Maha Haldenwang and Hunter Engineering join the portfolio — the foundation of Egypt's professional workshop-equipment channel.
about.y1997P: Gehad El Bassiouni establishes the dedicated company to consolidate sales, installation, training and after-sales under one roof. Rotary Lifts join the portfolio, then Ecotechnics, then more — each brand a long-term commitment, not a line item.
about.disciplinesLead: Carried out by the same house, on the same equipment, for as long as it runs.
about.dSupplyDesc: Advisory and supply of workshop equipment from sixteen of the world's most exacting manufacturers. We do not list brands; we represent them.
about.dInstallDesc: Factory-grade commissioning and calibration by certified engineers — lift anchors, wheel-aligner sensors, compressor lines, paint-booth controls.
about.dAfterDesc: Preventive maintenance and corrective repair under tier-based contracts — Bronze, Silver, Gold. Uptime is the deliverable; the invoice is a footnote.
about.dTrainingDesc: Operator training, technical support and genuine spare parts. The equipment stays current; the technician who runs it stays sharper.
about.truckLaneHeading: We run Egypt's only Maha-licensed truck test lane.
about.refusalsTitle: Three things we refuse to do.
about.refusalsLead: A fifty-year relationship with a market is built on what a company chooses not to do as much as what it does. These are ours.
about.r1Head: We do not sell equipment we cannot service.
about.r1P: Every brand on our roster comes with a certified engineer, a stocked spare-parts shelf and a maintenance SLA. If we cannot support it in Cairo, we do not sell it in Cairo.
about.r2Head: We do not quote a price without quoting a relationship.
about.r2P: The invoice is the start of the work, not the end. Installation, training and the first maintenance cycle are part of the proposal — not a separate conversation six months later.
about.r3Head: We do not move faster than our standard allows.
about.r3P: We have turned away deals that would have required installing equipment without calibration, or supporting brands without trained technicians. It is the reason we have lasted forty-eight years.
about.principlesTitle: Four principles. Signed by everyone who works here.
about.vPrecisionDesc: The right equipment, correctly calibrated. Everything else follows from this.
about.vLongevityDesc: We service what we sell — for as long as it runs. A ten-year horizon is standard.
about.vDepthDesc: Every machine has a certified engineer behind it. No exceptions.
about.vPartnershipDesc: Our relationships with customers, and with our sixteen manufacturers, are measured in decades.

services.heading: Our Services
services.intro: We don't just supply equipment — we support it. Our after-sales team is with you from installation to end-of-life, ensuring peak performance every step of the way.
services.offerSubtitle: Six core service disciplines, delivered by our certified technical team.
services.ctaSubtitle: Our team will respond within one business day.

news.heading: News & Updates
news.subheading: Company news, product launches, and industry updates.

contact.heading: Contact Us
contact.subheading: Our team typically responds within one business day.
contact.successMessage: Thank you for reaching out. Our team will be in touch shortly.

footer.tagline: Egypt's premier distributor of premium automotive workshop equipment. 45+ years of expertise, 14 international brands.
